prompt: 请对照 cuDNN/cuBLAS 算子列表，判断我这个算子有没有高效内置实现。

steps.text: vector add 需对照 PyTorch、cuBLAS、cuDNN 多层文档（Claude 也会跨 NVIDIA + PyTorch 多页）。
检查 torch.add 与 CUDA 可用性
steps.command:
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/python3 -c try:
 import torch
 print('torch', torch.__version__)
 print('cuda', torch.cuda.is_available())
 print('add_op', torch.add)
except Exception as e:
 print('ERR', e)

steps.text:
对照 NVIDIA + PyTorch 文档，判断 vector add 是否有高效内置路径。

🔎 检索计划：共 3 个页面（Claude 类助手通常也会跨页面对照，而非只看一页）。

steps.title: 1. Introduction — cuBLAS 13.3 documentation
steps.snippet: 1. Introduction — cuBLAS 13.3 documentation 1. Introduction 1.1. Data Layout 1.2. New and Legacy cuBLAS API 1.3. Example Code 1.4. Forward Compatibility 1.5. Floating Point Emulation 1.5.1. BF16x9 1.5.2. Fixed-Point 1.5.2.1. Dynamic Mantissa Control 1.5.2.2. Fixed Mantissa Control 1.5.2.3. Representation and Mappings 1.5.2.4. Fixed-Point Workspace Requirements 1.5.2.5. Fixed-Point Performance Guide 1.5.3. Default Lib

steps.text: 页面 2/3 · cuDNN 文档首页
steps.title: NVIDIA cuDNN — NVIDIA cuDNN
steps.snippet: NVIDIA cuDNN — NVIDIA cuDNN Skip to main content Back to top Ctrl + K NVIDIA cuDNN Choose version Search Ctrl + K Search Ctrl + K NVIDIA cuDNN Choose version Table of Contents Quick Start Samples Release notes Developer Guide Overview Core Concepts Graphs Hardware Forward Compatibility Odds and Ends Debugging Frontend API Operations Attention Block Scaling Causal Conv1d Concatenate Convolutions Matmul MoE Group

steps.title: torch.add — PyTorch 2.12 documentation
steps.snippet: torch.add — PyTorch 2.12 documentation Skip to main content Back to top Ctrl + K Install PyTorch  User Guide PyTorch Main Components torch.compiler torch.export Developer Notes Accelerator Integration Reference API torch torch.nn torch.nn.functional torch.Tensor Tensor Attributes Tensor Views Automatic Mixed Precision package - torch.amp Automatic differentiation package - torch.autograd torch.library torc

steps.text:
**3 页对照结果见上方逐步检索**

• PyTorch：torch.add 原生支持
• cuBLAS：Level-1 axpy 家族覆盖标量乘加
• cuDNN：无独立 element-wise add 页，通常不走 cuDNN

→ 不存在必须手写 kernel 才有实现的情况。

outcome: 结论（实测）：多页对照后，内置路径足够。
